subcodes.first_line: God hath testified of His Own Self, by His Own Self, before the creation of all things, that there is none other God but Him, the Mighty, the All-Bountiful. Whoso hath heard the Call hath attained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله لنفسه بنفسه قبل خلق الاشیاء انه لا اله الا انا العزیز الوهاب من سمع الندآء فاز
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment
